narrative:
Green Creek Township has 2,256 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
